objective: Refactor lib root and deepen shared contracts inside lib: keep main.dart as slim root facade; extract duplicated fractal module parameter schemas into CommonFractalParams so builders/custom modules reuse one contract for iteration, bailout, and 4-color scheme parameters.
completedSlices: Created lib/app/ with flutter_fractals_app.dart, startup.dart, diagnostic_apps.dart, and AGENTS.md.
Moved root app/provider/bootstrap classes from lib/main.dart into lib/app/flutter_fractals_app.dart while preserving main.dart compatibility via export.
Moved deferred startup service initialization into lib/app/startup.dart.
Moved SAFE_MODE/BOOT_STEP diagnostic widgets into lib/app/diagnostic_apps.dart.
Updated lib/AGENTS.md to document app/ topology and main.dart facade role.
Audited lib root topology: main.dart is the only root facade, AGENTS.md is documentation/out-of-scope, no next candidates remain.

Added CommonFractalParams.iterations, bailout, and colorScheme4 shared contracts; reused them in escape-time builder, raymarched 3D builder, Julia, Julia Dual, Phoenix, Nova, Mandelbulb, and Mandelbox modules.
Added test/common_fractal_params_test.dart to pin shared parameter schema behavior.
